name: list_folder
description: List the contents of a folder in Dropbox, returning metadata for each file and subfolder. Supports pagination via cursor for folders with many items. Use an empty string for path to list the root folder.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: The path to the folder to list. Use empty string '' for the root, or a path like '/Documents'.

parameters.name: recursive
parameters.description: If true, list contents of all subfolders recursively.

parameters.name: include_media_info
parameters.description: If true, include media information (dimensions, duration) for photos and videos.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return per request (1-2000). Default is server-determined.
